name: Jumpcloud Empty Access Groups
description: Detects empty groups in jumpcloud that may indicate stale access governance artifacts.
query: SELECT g.id AS id, g.name AS group_name FROM jumpcloud_groups g LEFT JOIN jumpcloud_group_memberships m ON g.id = m.group_id WHERE m.group_id IS NULL
remediation: Delete stale groups or document their future purpose and ownership before retaining them.
